tools.name: -health-check
tools.description: Internal health check tool. Verifies Notion API token and connectivity.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search for pages and databases by title. Searches across all content shared with the integration.

tools.name: get-page
tools.description: Retrieve a page by its ID. Returns page properties and metadata.

pageId.description: The ID of the page to retrieve (can be with or without dashes)

tools.name: get-page-content
tools.description: Retrieve the full content/blocks of a page as formatted text. Set includeBlocks=true only when you need block IDs for editing operations.

includeBlocks.description: Include raw block data with IDs (default: false). Only set to true when you need to edit/insert blocks.

tools.name: create-page
tools.description: Create a new page in a database or as a child of an existing page.

parentId.description: Parent page ID or database ID

title.description: Page title (optional when properties object is provided for database pages)

properties.description: Complete properties object for database pages (optional). When provided for database pages, this will be used as-is without modification.

tools.name: update-page
tools.description: Update page properties (title, status, etc.) or archive/restore the page.

pageId.description: The ID of the page to update

properties.description: Properties to update (depends on database schema)

tools.name: set-page-icon
tools.description: Set or update a page's icon (emoji or external image URL).

icon.description: Emoji character (if iconType is 'emoji') or URL (if iconType is 'external')

tools.name: set-page-cover
tools.description: Set or update a page's cover image from an external URL.

tools.name: duplicate-page
tools.description: Duplicate a page with all its content and properties.

pageId.description: The ID of the page to duplicate

newTitle.description: Title for the duplicated page (optional, defaults to 'Copy of [original title]')

targetParentId.description: ID of the parent page/database where to place the duplicate (optional, defaults to same parent)

tools.name: get-database
tools.description: Retrieve a database by its ID. Returns database schema and properties.

tools.name: query-database
tools.description: Query database entries with optional filters and sorts. Returns compact results by default (just titles). Use properties parameter to get specific fields.

databaseId.description: The ID of the database to query

filter.description: Filter object (optional, see Notion API docs for syntax)

pageSize.description: Number of results per page (max 100, default 100)

startCursor.description: Cursor for pagination. Use next_cursor from previous response to get next page.

properties.description: Array of property names to include in results. If not provided, returns only title/name. Use ["*"] to get all properties.

tools.name: create-database
tools.description: Create a new database as a child of a page.

tools.name: update-database-schema
tools.description: Update database schema by adding, modifying, or removing properties (columns). To remove a property, set its value to null.

databaseId.description: The ID of the database to update

properties.description: Properties to add or modify. To remove a property, set its value to null.

tools.name: get-block
tools.description: Retrieve a specific block by its ID.

tools.name: get-block-children
tools.description: Retrieve children blocks of a block or page. Returns formatted text by default. Set includeBlocks=true only when you need block IDs for editing operations.

blockId.description: The ID of the block or page

includeBlocks.description: Include raw block data with IDs (default: false). Only set to true when you need to edit/insert blocks.

tools.name: append-blocks
tools.description: Append content blocks to a page or block.

blockId.description: The ID of the page or block to append to

blocks.description: Array of block objects to append (see Notion API docs for block format)

tools.name: update-block
tools.description: Update a block's content. The content structure depends on the block type.

blockId.description: The ID of the block to update

content.description: Block content object (depends on block type, see Notion API docs)

tools.name: delete-block
tools.description: Delete (archive) a block.

blockId.description: The ID of the block to delete

tools.name: create-column-layout
tools.description: Create a column layout with multiple columns containing blocks.

pageId.description: The ID of the page to add columns to

columns.description: Array of column blocks. Each column contains an array of blocks.

tools.name: create-advanced-blocks
tools.description: Create advanced block types: callout with custom icon/color, toggle with children, synced blocks.

tools.name: list-users
tools.description: List all users in the workspace.

tools.name: get-user
tools.description: Retrieve a user by ID.

tools.name: get-me
tools.description: Retrieve the bot user information (your integration).

tools.name: list-comments
tools.description: List comments on a page or block.

tools.name: create-comment
tools.description: Create a comment on a page or discussion.

pageId.description: The page ID to comment on (optional if discussionId is provided)

discussionId.description: The discussion ID to comment on (optional if pageId is provided)
